item.title: Speech-to-Text Demo Trained on Conversational Speech
item.author: Chiawei Lim
item.description: Huggingface Space Quick Demo of speech-to-text model trained with wav2vec2-conformer Try the model with examples listed, or upload flac format audio sampling at 16kHz. Photo by the author Note Detailed notes about the data preparation, model training and serving will be elaborated.

item.title: Understand Audio Data with Computer Vision Background
item.author: Chiawei Lim
item.description: Side by side comparison of audio and visual data for quick understanding.

item.title: Youtube to Text with Speech Recognition in Python
item.author: Chiawei Lim
item.description: Python-based libraries to download Youtube videos for NLP use cases

item.title: The Perks of using Jupyter Notebook in VS Code
item.author: Chiawei Lim
item.description: Why and how to use Jupyter Notebooks in VS Code 1 Introduction It’s no secret that Jupyter Notebook is the go-to IDE in the data science field. The cell nature of Jupyter allows instant running of a block of code snippet and manifest of the output. Photo by the author It works seamlessly well with the nature of data analysis operation, specifically in the way where the subsequent lines of code highly depend on the scrutinization of the current cell output.
